prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 上海石库门街拍人像
prompts.prompt: A candid street photograph of a young woman standing just inside the arched stone gateway of a {argument name="location" default="Shanghai shikumen longtang entrance"}, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. Full-body framing, centered composition, shot from within the lane looking outward — she stands beneath the ornate carved stone arch, morning summer light filtering in from behind. East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20) — skin subsurface scattering visible under soft morning directional light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. Dewy summer skin, light BB coverage, peachy tinted lip gloss. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="butter yellow linen co-ord"} — a cropped wide-collar top and matching high-waist wide-leg trousers, white leather slides. A woven micro bag in natural straw hangs from her forearm. Small pearl drop earrings catch the morning light. She stands with her weight shifted to one hip, fingers of one hand loosely hooked on the bag strap, gaze drifting slightly upward toward the arch above — a casual self-possession that reads as entirely natural yet somehow composed, the particular ease of a Shanghai girl who grew up moving effortlessly between old lanes and glossy shopping malls without ever noticing the gap. The stone arch rises around her, its carved brick relief worn but legible — the longtang name tile faintly visible above the keystone. Lane walls of old lime-washed brick recede behind her. At the lane's far vanishing point, above the old tile roofline, the upper floors of a distant Pudong tower dissolve in summer morning haze — a soft ghost of modern Shanghai hovering above the old stones, barely there. Two or three stray hairs displaced by morning lane air, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical. Soft directional morning light from outside the arch, cool-to-warm transition, long gentle shadows thrown by the arch onto the lane pavement beneath her feet. Gentle and warm, quiet contentment, a private sense of belonging. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

prompts.title: 僵尸生存 RPG 动漫风格广告海报
prompts.prompt:
创作一张戏剧性的日式僵尸生存 RPG 手机游戏广告海报，采用动漫与电影相结合的风格。垂直智能手机海报布局，高密度宣传设计，背景为黄昏时分残酷的城市末日，包含废弃的街道、烟雾、火花、碎片、受损的建筑物、霓虹灯，以及从后方逼近的僵尸群。画面中央，一位年轻的动漫女性坐在地上，姿势略显慵懒，双腿弯曲，一只手垂直握着一把黑色手枪。她留着齐肩的深棕色至黑色直发，皮肤苍白，穿着一件沾满血迹的超大号脏白色 T 恤。T 恤上垂直印有醒目的日文书法：“働きたくね〜”。她的表情区域处理得简洁且不突兀，以确保构图重点突出 T 恤、武器和氛围。在她周围，多名身穿破烂衣服的僵尸从左右背景中伸出双手向前抓取。

采用具有冲击力的游戏主视觉设计，包含 8 个清晰划分的宣传区域。区域 1：左上角游戏 Logo 区，包含 3 个文本元素，带有巨大的做旧英文标题“Dead or work”、较小的日文副标题“ゾンビサバイバルRPG”，以及带有白色和红色文字的厚重黑色喷溅背景。区域 2：右侧垂直标语区，包含 2 个文本元素，在粗糙的黑色笔触条上，上方为白色日文“動かない、ただ”，下方为巨大的红色垂直文字“生き残れ。”。区域 3：左中功能列表面板，包含 4 行功能，每行都有一个黑色方块内的白色图标和黄色/白色日文文案；标签分别为“ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ”、“拠点を強化・カスタマイズ”、“仲間と協力プレイ”和“デイリーミッションで報酬GET”。区域 4：右中奖励活动面板，包含 1 个标题和 3 个奖励项目；标题位于明亮的锯齿状黄色爆炸框中，写着“今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!”，下方是三个标注为“ゴールド ×5000”、“レア武器 (7日間)”和“サバイバルキット ×10”的物品框。区域 5：中下部游戏截图条，包含 4 个带有说明文字的缩略图；说明文字分别为“リアルタイムバトル!”、“基地を自由にカスタム!”、“仲間とレイドボスに挑め!”和“広大なオープンワールド!”。区域 6：底部行动呼吁横幅，包含 2 个文本元素，带有巨大的黄色和红色日文短语“今すぐダウンロード!”以及较小的白色/红色副标题“あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。”。区域 7：右下角商店徽章，包含 2 个徽章，显示 App Store 和 Google Play 风格的下载按钮。区域 8：右下角 QR 码区域，包含 1 个白色方块内的 QR 码。

整体美学：超精细、高对比度、肮脏、强烈、商业化精良的抽卡/手机游戏广告，将动漫角色艺术与写实的僵尸恐怖背景相结合。使用醒目的做旧字体、黑色笔触纹理、红色警示色、黄色宣传高光、金属 UI 边框以及电影般的橙灰色光影。

prompts.title: [品牌名称] + [产品]
prompts.prompt:
[BRAND NAME] + [PRODUCT] 

Act as a Senior Luxury Fashion Art Director and Studio Photographer specializing in high-end product key visuals for flagship campaigns, e-commerce editorials, and mobile-first brand content.

PHASE 1: FORMAT & CANVAS
Vertical format, 9:16 aspect ratio. Canvas background: a single flat field of warm off-white — not pure white, not grey. Target tone: soft ivory cream (#F4EFE6 equivalent), uniform and completely shadowless 
 across the entire background plane.
Autonomously determine [BRAND NAME]'s signature background tone — if the brand has a recognized house color for its packaging, tissue paper, or lookbook backgrounds, shift the canvas toward that specific off-white or neutral. The result must feel like an official brand document, not a generic studio.

PHASE 2: BACKGROUND PATTERN (WATERMARK LAYER)

Autonomously identify [BRAND NAME]'s iconic surface pattern, monogram, or archival motif — examples: a house monogram, toile print, geometric logo repeat, heritage emblem, or signature textile pattern.
Render this pattern across the entire background canvas as a ghost watermark: same tone as the background but with a slight value shift (approximately 8–12% darker 
or lighter than the base). The pattern must be large in scale — individual motifs spanning 15–25% of canvas width. Opacity: 10–18% maximum. No hard edges. The pattern should feel embossed or tone-on-tone woven, not printed. It must recede behind all other elements.

PHASE 3: LOGO PLACEMENT

Autonomously reproduce [BRAND NAME]'s official logo with complete fidelity — correct letterforms, proportions, secondary marks (emblems, crowns, stars, monogram icons).
Place the logo centered horizontally in the upper third of the frame (top 30% of canvas). Scale: the logo should span approximately 40–50% of canvas width — prominent but not overwhelming.
Logo rendering: flat 2D, no extrusion, no chrome. Color: autonomously apply [BRAND NAME]'s official logo colorway — the exact brand-standard color(s) used on official packaging and website. If the brand uses a two-tone logo (icon + wordmark in different colors), preserve that hierarchy precisely.
Directly below the main logo mark, place the full [BRAND NAME] wordmark in spaced capital letters — clean, geometric sans-serif, tracking: +200 to +300, 
same brand color, optical size approximately 60% of logo height. No decorative elements between logo and wordmark.

PHASE 4: PRODUCT PLACEMENT

Render [PRODUCT] as a photorealistic studio object with maximum material fidelity:
— Leather: visible grain, pore structure, stitching thread texture, realistic edge paint.
— Hardware: gold or silver metal with micro-reflections, not flat.
— Canvas/fabric: woven fiber detail, not smooth CG.
— All brand-specific surface patterns on the product must be accurate and legible.
Placement: the product enters the frame from the bottom-right corner at a natural 25–35 degree angle, as if casually placed or mid-motion. The product is cropped — only 60–75% of the object is visible 
within the frame. The crop should feel intentional and editorial, not accidental. The product occupies the lower 55–65% of the canvas.
The product must feel physically present in the space — not floating. Cast an extremely soft, barely visible contact shadow (opacity 8–12%) on the canvas beneath the nearest edge. No hard drop shadows.

PHASE 5: LIGHTING

Lighting: simulated large north-facing studio window light. Soft, directional, shadowless on the background. Color temperature: 5500–6000K (neutral daylight, slightly cool). 
Key light: large softbox equivalent from upper-left, filling the entire product surface evenly with 
minimal contrast ratio (1.2:1 to 1.5:1 max).
Fill light: large bounce from right side, eliminating all harsh shadows. No rim light. No dramatic contrast. The lighting philosophy is: "the product sells itself — light only reveals, never performs."
Global Illumination enabled for subtle inter-reflections between product surfaces. No spec

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 炸猪排饭烹饪分镜
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a monochrome cooking storyboard illustration showing the preparation and serving of a Japanese-style katsudon rice bowl, drawn like a detailed manga storyboard or recipe process sheet.

Canvas: Wide horizontal aspect ratio, about 2.4:1, white background, arranged as exactly 12 rectangular panels in a clean grid: 6 panels across the top row and 6 panels across the bottom row. Thin black borders separate every panel. No captions, no speech bubbles, no logos, no watermark.

Visual style: Highly detailed pencil sketch and light watercolor-wash look, mostly grayscale with subtle warm beige tones in the egg sauce and fried cutlet. Fine crosshatching, visible paper texture, realistic hand-drawn food textures, steam, highlights on oil and sauce, cinematic close-up framing in every panel.

Subject: A step-by-step cooking sequence for {argument name="dish name" default="katsudon"}, featuring sliced onion, breaded pork cutlet, simmering egg sauce, rice, and garnish. Use realistic adult hands when hands appear, cropped close to the food.

Panel layout and exact panel count: Show exactly 12 panels, ordered left to right, top row then bottom row:
1. Close-up of hands slicing a pale onion into thin crescent slices on a cutting board with a large kitchen knife.
2. Close-up of a breaded pork cutlet on a cutting board, held with tongs, covered in coarse crispy crumbs.
3. Close-up of the fried cutlet being cut into thick strips with a knife, fingers holding it steady.
4. Top-down close-up of clear liquid or broth being poured into a round metal pan, creating circular ripples.
5. Close-up of sliced onions simmering in bubbling broth in the pan, steam rising.
6. Close-up of the sliced cutlet being placed on top of the onions in the pan by hand.
7. Close-up of beaten egg mixture being poured over the cutlet and onions, creamy ribbons spreading through the pan.
8. Close-up of a metal lid covering the pan while steam surrounds the edges.
9. Close-up of a large bowl filled with fluffy white rice, rice grains clearly defined.
10. Close-up of the cooked cutlet, onion, and soft egg mixture being slid from the pan onto the rice bowl, strands of egg stretching.
11. Close-up of the finished bowl being sprinkled with thin dark seaweed strips and green garnish on top, steam rising.
12. Close-up serving shot of chopsticks lifting one saucy slice of cutlet with soft egg dripping, the rice bowl visible underneath.

Composition constraints: Keep each panel tightly framed and food-focused; maintain consistent lighting and hand-drawn pencil shading across all panels; make the sequence readable as a recipe storyboard; do not add text labels, numbers, extra panels, utensils not described, or colorful modern graphics.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 炸猪排饭烹饪分镜

prompts.title: 电商主图 - 大理石梳妆台上的奢华香水广告
prompts.prompt: luxury e-commerce advertising photo of a premium perfume bottle on a polished gray-and-white marble vanity, shot in a warm cinematic studio style with soft golden lighting, shallow depth of field, and elegant reflections. The composition is square and high-end, with the perfume bottle centered slightly right of frame and promotional text on the left. The bottle is a tall sculpted hourglass-shaped glass flacon with smoky transparent gray glass fading darker at the base, a glossy gold spherical cap, a gold collar engraved with fine branding, and a large metallic gold interlocking monogram on the front. Keep the branding-inspired feel but do not add extra products. In the foreground left, include 1 cut-crystal bowl with a gold rim, partially cropped. In the background right, include 1 brushed gold cylindrical vase holding 1 bouquet of soft white flowers, blurred. Behind the bottle, add 1 black marble rectangular box with subtle white veining and gold trim. In the lower right foreground, include 1 draped piece of champagne-colored satin fabric, softly out of focus. The background should be dark, luxurious, and softly blurred, with rich brown-black tones and a vertical shadowed panel on the left to support typography. Add elegant serif headline text on the upper left reading {argument name="headline text" default="Premium Perfume,"} in large warm beige letters, with a smaller serif subheading beneath reading {argument name="tagline" default="Subtlety and Elegance"}, plus a thin short gold horizontal line below the subheading. Place a small white logo in the top-right corner reading {argument name="brand logo" default="Pollo.ai"}. Emphasize premium materials, realistic glass refraction, gold metallic highlights, luxury product photography, refined composition, soft bokeh, and upscale beauty-ad aesthetics.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 美食街头摄影与信息图
prompts.prompt:
Image 1 Prompt:- A premium street-food product photograph of {argument name="food item" default="crispy fried momos"} arranged in a {argument name="tray" default="black serving tray"}, centered against a warm {argument name="background" default="White seamless studio background"}. The momos have a deep golden crispy texture with realistic oil shine and crunchy folds. Fresh green herbs and spicy dipping sauce add contrast to the composition. Soft cinematic lighting creates rich highlights and subtle shadows beneath the tray. Ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro food photography, premium fast-food advertisement style, hyper realistic, 8K.

Image 2 Prompt: - Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of fried momos.

Top → Bottom structure:
Crispy Outer Layer (golden crunchy fried texture with crisp folds)
→ Vegetable Filling (finely chopped vegetables with vibrant color)
→ Spice Seasoning (floating chili flakes and herbs)
→ Sauce Layer (spicy red dipping sauce texture)
→ Tray Base (minimal black serving tray)

All elements must be perfectly centered and evenly spaced vertically. Use a warm White seamless studio background with soft commercial lighting and realistic shadows beneath each floating layer. The composition should feel like a premium street-food advertisement combined with a clean infographic layout.

Add clean minimalist text labels with thin pointer lines using these exact labels:
“Crispy Layer”
“Filling”
“Seasoning”
“Sauce”
“Tray”
Ultra-realistic texture detail, premium food photography, 8K.

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 优雅新娘婚礼人像
prompts.prompt:
[Person] Follows Image 1, Image 2, Image 3.

[Pose & Expression]
Sitting on a {argument name="sofa color" default="beige"} sofa, looking towards the camera with a slightly playful expression and head tilted down. Holding the edges of a white veil with both hands, while a bouquet of {argument name="bouquet" default="white calla lilies"} rests naturally on the lap.

[Outfit]
Wearing a sophisticated {argument name="dress style" default="white heart-shaped draped off-shoulder wedding dress"}. A silk sash belt emphasizes the waistline, with luxurious silk texture wrapping the body.

[Hair & Makeup]
Neat low bun hairstyle with thin strands of bangs curving along the face line. Wearing a voluminous white tulle veil, with bright bridal makeup featuring subtle highlighter and rose-toned lips.

[Lighting]
Subtle indoor lighting creates a warm and bright space, captured like a realistic smartphone photo with natural texture and contrast.

[Texture & Mood]
Harmony of pure white dress texture and matte velvet sofa. Dominated by white, gold, and light beige tones for a clean, elegant, and romantic wedding atmosphere.

[Camera & Angle]
High-angle shot looking down at the subject, capturing the silhouette and bouquet stably. Sharp focus on the person with soft out-focusing of background decorations.

[Background]
Luxury beige velvet sofa on marble floor with striped cushions. Window frames and green indoor plants in the background for an exotic wedding hall feel. Small Meta Threads logo in the bottom right with white script signature "CHAse". 9:16 ratio

prompts.prompt: Create a moody vertical close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} with long, thick, wavy {argument name="hair color" default="black hair"}, sitting in a dark low-key environment. Her face is completely hidden by a centered opaque rectangular censor block in a muted dark brown-to-gray gradient, covering from the upper forehead area down to below the chin, while the rest of the portrait remains visible. prompts.title: 头像 / 头像 - Y2K 闪光镜面自拍
prompts.prompt:
A moody late-night mirror selfie in a {argument name="location" default="luxury high-rise bathroom"} with a glowing city skyline beyond the windows. A young woman with long, slightly disheveled black hair leans over a marble sink, loose strands half-covering one eye. Shot through a smudged, water-spotted mirror that captures raw imperfections for an authentic feel. A harsh direct flash bursts into the frame, producing overexposed highlights, lens flare, and that unmistakable early-2000s compact camera nostalgia.
The marble counter is scattered with luxury skincare, cosmetics, jewelry, and a phone, all adding an intimate editorial mood. Neon-lit skyscrapers and hotel windows glow in the mirror's background reflections, evoking an urban nightlife atmosphere. Fair skin tones contrast against dark clothing and black hair. The scene feels candid, effortlessly cool, and deeply intimate.
Style: Y2K flash photography, candid mirror selfie, Korean editorial aesthetic, indie sleaze, hotel bathroom, luxury lifestyle, cinematic nightlife, disposable camera look, film grain, flash burn, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, authentic imperfections, Pinterest-viral mood, high-fashion casual energy, raw unfiltered photography.
Camera: direct flash, compact digital camera, 35mm equivalent, harsh lighting, slight motion blur, visible noise, natural color grading, vertical composition, ultra-realistic, high detail.
